evals.prompt: 변경된 코드에 대해 종합 웹 품질 검토를 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: 2개 영역(접근성 + SEO&웹성능) 순차 실행, 통합 HTML+CSV 리포트 생성

assertions.text: HTML report file (report.html) was generated
CSV report file (report.csv) was generated
Report contains accessibility section (Section A)
Report contains SEO and Web Performance section (Section B)
All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
Report is written in Korean

evals.prompt: dashboard/page.tsx와 StatsCard.tsx만 대상으로 웹 품질 전체 감사해줘
evals.expected_output: 지정된 2개 파일에 대해 접근성 + SEO&웹성능 전체 검토, 통합 리포트 생성

assertions.text: HTML report file (report.html) was generated
CSV report file (report.csv) was generated
Report contains accessibility section (Section A)
Report contains SEO and Web Performance section (Section B)
All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
Report is written in Korean
Only dashboard/page.tsx and StatsCard.tsx are reviewed (no other files)

evals.prompt: Navbar.tsx 하나만 종합 품질 검토해줘. 접근성이랑 시맨틱 HTML 위주로 자세히 봐줘
evals.expected_output: 단일 파일 대상 접근성 + SEO&웹성능 검토, 접근성 이슈 상세 분석

assertions.text: HTML report file (report.html) was generated

All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
